ability.name: Stellar Slash
ability.description:
Heal 300/375/575 (AP), then deal 161/242/362 (AD+Armor) physical damage to the current target.

N.O.V.A. Strike: Cleave the battlefield, briefly knocking up all enemies and dealing 81/121/181 (AD+Armor) physical damage.

ability.name: Fish Frenzy
ability.description:
Passive: For every 1% missing Health, gain 2% (AS) Attack Speed.

Active: Deal 110/165/250 (AD) physical damage to the target, increased by 50% if they're a tank.

idealItems.reason: Stacks attack damage and defense as HP drops
Shield and AD burst for duelling

ability.name: Aim For The Head
ability.description:
Passive: Attacks have a 15% Lucky chance to fire an empowered Headshot, dealing 190/285/555 (AD+AP) physical damage.

N.O.V.A. Strike: Mark all enemies, increasing damage taken by 10%. The first time marked targets drop below 50% Health, Headshot them for 76/114/222 (AD+AP) physical damage.

Lucky: Check twice and take the better outcome.

idealItems.reason: Spell shield on first sniper shot

ability.name: Accretion
ability.description: Deal 262/384/588 (HP+AP) magic damage to the lowest Health enemy in range and permanently gain 12/18/33 maximum Health. If this kills them, permanently gain 25/35/65 maximum Health instead.

idealItems.reason: Massive HP pool for frontline bulk
Burn damage and constant AoE pressure

ability.name: Temporal Shot
ability.description: Active: Fire a blast at the current target that deals 150/225/340 (AD+AP) physical damage. Every 8 takedowns, gain a drone that deals 8/12/18 (AD) physical damage to the current target on cast.

ability.name: Shield of Daybreak
ability.description: Gain 400/475/625 (AP) Shield for 4 seconds. Bash the current target, dealing 226/339/509 (Armor+MR) magic damage and stunning them for 1.75/1.75/2 seconds.

idealItems.reason: Massive HP pool for frontline bulk
Burn damage and constant AoE pressure

ability.name: Dark Matter
ability.description: Hurl a shard towards the current target, dealing 215/325/490 (AP) magic damage to the first target it hits. After hitting its initial target or at its final destination, the dagger explodes dealing 40/60/90 (AP) magic damage to nearby targets.

idealItems.reason: Burst the frontline on first cast

ability.name: Groovin' Susan
ability.description: Transform for 6 seconds, temporarily gaining 250/325/425 max Health, and dealing 44/70/115 (HP+AP) magic damage to adjacent enemies each second.

idealItems.reason: Massive HP pool for frontline bulk
Burn damage and constant AoE pressure

ability.name: Huddle Up!
ability.description:
Gain 400/475/575 (AP) Shield for 4 seconds. For the duration, allies within two hexes gain 15/25/60 (AP) Armor and Magic Resistance.

Meep Bonus: Meeps grant 125/160/210 (AP) Shield to the nearest 1 (Potential) allies for 4 seconds.

idealItems.reason: Massive HP pool for frontline bulk
Burn damage and constant AoE pressure

ability.name: Upheaval
ability.description: Heal 227/276/351 (HP+AP), then briefly knock up adjacent enemies and deal 80/120/180 (AP) magic damage.

idealItems.reason: Massive HP pool for frontline bulk
Burn damage and constant AoE pressure

ability.name: Diviner's Judgment
ability.description: Stab the target, causing them to bleed for 520/780/1170 (AD+AP) physical damage over 18 seconds. After the attack, leap to the highest percent Health enemy within 3 hexes.

idealItems.reason: First-hit spell shield for safe engage

ability.name: Double Time
ability.description:
Passive: Attacks deal 30/45/90 (AP) bonus magic damage and an additional 70/105/165 (AP) stacking magic damage over 6 seconds. While an enemy has 5 or more stacks, Teemo is in The Groove.

Active: Gain 150% Attack Speed for 3 attacks.

ability.name: Fate's Gambit
ability.description:
Draw a card with a value between 1 and 9 by Lucky chance, then throw it at the target. Based on the card drawn, deal between 200/300/510 (AP) and 400/600/1020 (AP) magic damage. Overkill damage bounces to the nearest enemy.

3-Star Bonus: If a 9 is thrown, generate 1 gold.
Lucky: Check twice and take the better outcome.

idealItems.reason: Draw a card every cast for gold/damage
Faster card throws with mana on attack

ability.name: Meepteor Shower
ability.description:
Call down a Meepteor on the target that deals 350/525/790 (AP) magic damage.

Meep Bonus: An additional 2 (Potential) mini Meepteors are called down on nearby targets dealing 35/50/80 (AP) magic damage each.

ability.name: Star Strike
ability.description: Reposition to a flanking position and hurl a piercing kunai that shreds enemy Armor.

ability.name: Tidal Slashes
ability.description: Unleash a rapid barrage of multi-directional slashes, dealing physical damage to surrounding enemies.

ability.name: Slingshot Mane
ability.description: Fling a boomerang at enemies in a line. Meeps also fly out and attack on impact.

ability.name: Chemical Rage
ability.description: Guzzle his brew to heal and apply a chilling effect to nearby enemies, slowing their attacks.

ability.name: Counter Star-ike

ability.name: Fishbones!

ability.name: Meep Impact

ability.name: ULTRA MEGA TIME KICK
ability.description: Launch a bouncing magic ball with probability-based outcomes, dealing magic damage to enemies hit.

ability.name: Indestructible
ability.description: Stack a massive shield and convert excess shielding into healing for himself.

ability.name: Advanced Defences
ability.description: Raise his shield for bonus Durability, then crash it forward in a cone dealing physical damage.

ability.name: Marked for Death
ability.description: Hurl a harpoon to pull and stun an enemy, then teleport behind them for a cleaving slash.

ability.name: Paddle Star
ability.description: Launch a star projectile that changes direction mid-flight for massive magic damage on the final target.

ability.name: Hopped-Up Hacks
ability.description: Hack reality open with a rift, storing incoming damage and releasing it as a burst of magic damage.

ability.name: Pale Cascade
ability.description: Summon orbiting moonlight orbs that create a shield and burst on contact with enemies.

idealItems.reason: AoE MR shred on orb spin

ability.name: Meep Bait
ability.description: Dash through enemies and bait them toward a spot where a gang of mega Meeps erupts to deal magic damage.

ability.name: Test of Spirit
ability.description: Raise a shield, drain an enemy's spirit to deal damage, then slam the ground in an area.

ability.name: Bullet Cluster
ability.description: Fire a volley of missiles at the target area. Killing enemies resets her mana.

ability.name: It's Raining Stars
ability.description: Call down a constellation effect dealing magic damage with variable outcomes based on the stars drawn.

ability.name: Grasp of Convergence
ability.description: Fling vines to root and stun a cluster of nearby enemies, dealing magic damage scaling with his health.

ability.name: Gun Goddess Arsenal
ability.description: Choose your mode before combat: Channeler, Challenger, or Replicator. Each mode grants a unique ability and that trait.

idealItems.reason: Core for Channeler Gun Goddess mode

ability.name: Disco Inferno
ability.description: Temporarily forge a Radiant item for an ally, enter the Groove, and charge through enemies dealing magic damage.

ability.name: Alien Scythe
ability.description: Gain Durability then heal, followed by a sweeping knockup slash that deals physical damage.

ability.name: Jump and Jive
ability.description: Knock up nearby enemies with a stylish maneuver, enter the Groove, then unload with rapid gunfire.

ability.name: Unstoppable
ability.description: Fire proximity blasts at all nearby enemies then dash forward, gaining a temporary shield.

ability.name: Psionic Storm
ability.description: Channel a growing psionic storm that deals increasing magic damage, tapering as it widens.

ability.name: Deathbeam
ability.description: Channel a massive cosmic beam down a line, dealing enormous magic damage while ignoring Magic Resist.

ability.name: Asteroid Blaster
ability.description: Strafe missiles across the board and occasionally launch a mega-blast that ignites Meep explosives.

idealItems.reason: Attack speed for frequent Meep missiles

ability.name: Singularity
ability.description: Create a black hole that splits into gravitational shards dealing magic damage to all enemies caught inside.

ability.name: Cosmic Pursuit
ability.description: Mark a target for death. Consume the mark with an arrow jump that deals massive physical damage.

ability.name: Fracture Reality
ability.description: Summon clones that distract enemies, then fire homing bolts at each that erupt on final impact.

ability.name: Psi Strikes
ability.description: Meditate then unleash three psionic strikes, projecting a psi-state image of himself to deal bonus damage.

ability.name: Gravity Matrix
ability.description: Attract all enemy projectiles toward itself, then release a shockwave dealing magic damage to nearby enemies.

ability.name: Bubble Pop
ability.description: Launch a bouncing disco bubble that knocks up enemies on contact, spraying healing globs at allies.

ability.name: Calamity
ability.description: Raise a massive shield, then summon an astrolabe that knocks enemies away from Nunu.

ability.name: Gravitational Spin
ability.description: Spin into a shield then roll forward, knocking enemies into a line and reducing Meep damage taken.

ability.name: Time Warp
ability.description: Dash through time and release an adaptive wave — deals AD or AP damage based on her highest stat.

ability.name: Tongue Lash
ability.description: At low health, gain a massive shield and heal. Then lash out with his tongue, dealing magic damage.

ability.name: Stellar Ricochet
ability.description: Bounce attacks off multiple enemies, leaving feathers that all snap back dealing physical damage.

ability.name: Ultra Friendly Object
ability.description: Summon a UFO that abducts and removes enemies on kill. Meep astronauts provide bonus empowerment.

ability.name: Party Crasher
ability.description: Passively fire rapid electric bolts. When low on health, become untargetable to repair, then unleash a disco ball uppercut on return. Enters the Groove.

ability.name: Perfect Bladework
ability.description: Reveal enemy vitals and deal True Damage, healing on hit. Grants her team a powerful aura.

ability.name: Collateral Damage
ability.description: Passively fires cone projectiles on each attack. Active: unload an explosive shell dealing massive physical damage.

ability.name: Space Opera
ability.description: Attack at a fixed rate. Spectral hands reach from the void to hold enemies, and every 4th shot is a piercing finale.

ability.name: Dark Form
ability.description: Transform into her Dark Form and tether drain multiple enemies, then erupt in a final dark burst.

ability.name: Reality Tear
ability.description: Build stacking True Damage on each attack, then open a rift that shields allies and grants them bonus speed.

ability.name: Psionic Crush
ability.description: Attach psionic debris to multiple enemies, then slam them together for massive magic damage and a stun.

ability.name: Lend Me a Hand
ability.description: Shadow hands passively mark enemies. Active: empower the hands to erupt on all marked targets simultaneously.

ability.name: Quantum Clone
ability.description: Create item-inheriting clones of himself. While any clone is alive, gain 40% bonus Attack Damage.
